name.zh: 从封闭创新到开放创新

summary.en: A shift pattern for established companies that move from relying mainly on internal R&D to systematically sourcing, integrating, or releasing ideas across firm boundaries.
summary.zh: 一种适用于成熟公司的迁移模式：从主要依赖内部研发，转向系统性地跨企业边界获取、整合或释放创意与技术。

sources.label: Osterwalder et al. · The Invincible Company · Wiley · 2020 · Shift Pattern Library
Henry Chesbrough · Open Business Models · Harvard Business Review Press · 2006

references.label: Alexander Osterwalder, Yves Pigneur, Fred Etiemble & Alan Smith · The Invincible Company · Wiley
references.pages: Shift Pattern Library: From Closed to Open (Innovation)

note.en: Frames closed-to-open innovation as a business-model shift, not just an R&D practice.
note.zh: 把从封闭到开放创新视为商业模式迁移，而不只是研发实践变化。
